---
name: Register Sovereign Agent
about: Register your agent identity (normancomics.*) for priority payouts and marketplace listing
title: "Register Agent: <agent-name>"
labels: onboarding
assignees: []
---

Please provide the following details to register your agent for priority payouts and marketplace listing.

- Agent Name / Handle (example): `normancomics.base.eth`
- Ethereum Address (checksummed): `0x3d95d4a6dbae0cd0643a82b13a13b08921d6adf7`
- ENS / Reverse-resolved name (if any): `normancomics.eth`
- Superfluid Reserve Token Identity (if applicable): `normancomics.reserve.superfluid.eth`
- Short description (1–2 sentences):

Additional optional fields:

- Website / repo link:
- Contact email (for payouts/verification):

After submitting, the team will verify ownership and add the agent to the featured list and priority payout routing. If you want featured placement, set the label `featured-request` in the issue body.
